FP&A Schema: add forecastAmount Float, costModelKey String?, isAutoActual Boolean to BudgetLine + BudgetActual; run prisma db push
FP&A Cost model mapping config: create src/lib/budgeting/cost-model-map.ts mapping standard categories to cost model keys (grandTotalG, deptCosts, serviceRevenues)
FP&A Analytics API: update /api/budgeting/analytics to auto-populate actuals from loadAndCompute() when isAutoActual=true, merge with manual actuals
FP&A Types: update src/lib/budgeting/types.ts for forecastAmount, costModelKey, isAutoActual, BudgetAnalytics.autoActualTotal
FP&A API routes: update lines/route.ts and lines/[id]/route.ts to accept forecastAmount and costModelKey fields
FP&A Hooks: update hooks.ts — add forecastAmount to CreateBudgetLineInput, add useBudgetForecastUpdate mutation
FP&A Overview tab redesign: 5 KPI cards (Plan/Forecast/Actual/Variance/YE Projection) + 3-column Budget|Forecast|Actual table replacing current 2-column
FP&A Lines tab: add inline Forecast column with editable input, save on blur, show delta vs plan in color
FP&A Cost model mapping UI: in Lines tab, add 'Link to cost model' dropdown per line using COST_MODEL_MAP keys
FP&A Template seed: update TemplateSeedButton to assign costModelKey to matching categories, set isAutoActual=true for expense lines
FP&A Phase 1 test: curl tests for analytics API auto-actuals, verify 3-column table renders, build passes
FP&A P&L Schema: add BudgetSection model (id, planId, name, sectionType: revenue|expense|gross_profit|ebitda, sortOrder) + prisma db push
FP&A Sections API: /api/budgeting/sections GET?planId + POST + [id] PUT/DELETE

FP&A Phase 2 test: curl test sections API, verify P&L tab renders sections + subtotals, drill-down panel opens
FP&A Forecast Schema: add BudgetForecastEntry model (id, planId, orgId, month Int, year Int, category, forecastAmount) + prisma db push
FP&A Forecast API: /api/budgeting/forecast GET?planId + POST (bulk upsert monthly entries)
FP&A Forecast engine: src/lib/budgeting/forecast.ts — linear extrapolation from actuals YTD to full-year projection, returns 12-month array
